text.tspan: u2022 Kubernetes: 10s node-not-ready threshold (after kubelet stops heartbeating)
u2022 Consul: ~10s for serf failure detection
u2022 Cassandra: 'phi accrual' failure detector u2014 not a fixed timeout,
u2212 every GC pause / scheduling hiccup / network blip
u2212 frequent leader churn u2192 unavailable for elections
u2212 huge network/CPU overhead from heartbeats
+ recovers within u2264 1s on real crash

g.text: u2212 honest crash takes ~200u2013300ms to detect

text.tspan: + very stable (e.g., for stateful DBs with expensive failover)
+ tolerates VM pauses, long stop-the-world GCs
u2212 long unavailability window during failover
